recipes.name: 3D Map with Landmarks
recipes.description: Travel route on 3D map with landmark overlays, camera follows path

allowed_inputs.description: Array of landmark objects with name, position
Map color theme: satellite, street, dark

review_hints.check: verify route path clips to map bounds
landmark labels readable at target resolution
camera speed smooth along entire route

recipes.name: Document Highlight
recipes.description: News article or document with animated text focus, blur/unblur, marker overlay

allowed_inputs.description: Exact phrase to highlight with marker

review_hints.check: focus phrase exactly matches body_snippet substring
blur transition does not obscure adjacent text
perspective tilt keeps text readable

recipes.name: Screenflow Product Demo
recipes.description: Product demo with screen mockups, cursor movements, feature callouts

allowed_inputs.description: Array of screenshot URLs or paths
Array of feature callout objects with text, position
Array of cursor [x,y] positions over time

review_hints.check: screenshot aspect ratio matches output canvas
callout text does not overlap UI elements
cursor path smooth and natural speed

recipes.name: Cinematic Hero Intro
recipes.description: Cinematic opener with 3D text, particles, glass HUD, scanner lines

review_hints.check: particles do not overlap title text
3D text readable without heavy anti-aliasing artifacts
HUD elements visible but not distracting
duration sufficient for viewer to read title

recipes.name: Transparent CTA Overlay
recipes.description: Lower-third CTA or overlay with transparent background for compositing

review_hints.check: transparent export renders valid alpha channel
text contrast sufficient against varied backdrops
position does not clip off-screen

recipes.name: Trajectory Timeline
recipes.description: Timeline with curved path motion, axis ticks, animated trajectory

allowed_inputs.description: Array of event objects with date, label, value
Array of [x,y] points for curved path

review_hints.check: axis tick marks evenly spaced and labeled
curved path smooth without sharp angles
event markers distinguishable from trajectory line

recipes.name: 3D Ranking Bars
recipes.description: Three-dimensional ranking bars with camera fly-through, animated growth

allowed_inputs.description: Array of ranked items with name, value, rank

review_hints.check: bar heights proportional to values, not ranks
camera fly-through does not clip bars
value labels readable at all camera angles

recipes.name: Audio-Reactive Visuals
recipes.description: Music-driven visuals: waveform, frequency bars, particle patterns synced to audio

allowed_inputs.description: Path or URL to audio file
Array of CSS colors for visual layers

review_hints.check: visual beats match audio transients within tolerance
no clipping or distortion at peak amplitude
frame rate sufficient for smooth waveform animation

recipes.name: Dual Chart Combo
recipes.description: Hybrid chart with bar and line series overlaid, animated axes

allowed_inputs.description: Array of bar series data points
Array of line series data points
Category or time labels for x-axis
Use separate y-axes for bar vs line

review_hints.check: bar and line axes scales match or secondary axis labeled
bar width does not occlude line markers
legend clearly distinguishes bar from line series

recipes.name: Launch Video Promo
recipes.description: Multi-sequence narrative launch video with terminal/cards and layered promo scenes

review_hints.check: cta visible on final frame for minimum hold duration
title text readable against background at all times
multi-sequence pacing feels natural not rushed

recipes.name: Real Estate Investing
recipes.description: Metric counters, lower thirds, footage overlays for real estate investment content

allowed_inputs.description: Array of metric objects with label, value, prefix

review_hints.check: counter numbers match input values exactly
lower third text does not overlap metric counters
property image aspect ratio fits output canvas

recipes.name: Product Hero Promo
recipes.description: Product hero image plus feature walkthrough with staggered callouts

allowed_inputs.description: Array of feature objects with title, description
URL or path to product hero image
Link to live demo or video

review_hints.check: feature callout text fully readable without overlap
hero image positioned without clipping important detail
transition between features smooth with consistent cadence

recipes.name: SVG Shape Morph
recipes.description: Shape-to-words or shape-to-shape SVG path morph transformation

allowed_inputs.description: SVG path data for source shape
SVG path data for target shape
Array of intermediate SVG path definitions

review_hints.check: source and target path have matching anchor point count for smooth morph
morph progression smooth with no visual tearing
fill and stroke interpolated consistently during morph

recipes.name: Generic Three.js Scene
recipes.description: Three.js 3D scene with camera rig, objects, and lighting suitable for product or abstract scenes

allowed_inputs.description: Scene type: product, abstract, environment, data
Camera movement: orbit, fly-through, static, follow
Array of 3D object descriptors with geometry and material
Lighting preset: studio, dramatic, natural, neon

review_hints.check: camera path does not clip or intersect scene objects
object materials visible under chosen lighting preset
no z-fighting between overlapping geometry

recipes.name: Kinetic Typography
recipes.description: Per-character kinetic text animation with timing, bounce, and emphasis effects

allowed_inputs.description: Array of per-character timing overrides in ms
Animation: bounce, wave, fade, typewriter, scatter
Array of character indices to accent-emphasize

review_hints.check: each character legible at peak animation speed
character spacing consistent after animation settles
accent characters visually distinguishable from rest

recipes.name: Canvas Post-Processing
recipes.description: HTML canvas post-processing pipeline with configurable effect layers

allowed_inputs.description: Array of source frame image data URIs or paths
Effect: glitch, vintage, magnifier, blur, pixelate
Canvas blend mode: source-over, multiply, screen

review_hints.check: effect intensity matches user setting within 5% tolerance
effect does not completely obscure original subject
frame rate remains stable with effect pipeline active

recipes.name: Cursor Agent Skills Announcement
recipes.description: Animated announcement card for AI agent skills with icon, demo snippet, and description

allowed_inputs.description: Name of the agent skill being announced
URL to skill or agent icon
Short code or CLI demo snippet

review_hints.check: demo snippet syntax highlighted and readable
skill name remains prominent throughout animation
icon and text layout balance within card bounds

recipes.name: 3D Glitch SVG Logo
recipes.description: Spinning 3D SVG logo with glitch artifacts, RGB split, and scanline distortion

allowed_inputs.description: URL or path to SVG logo
Rotation speed in degrees per second
Array of CSS colors for RGB split offset

review_hints.check: glitch effect does not hide core logo identity
spin axis remains stable and centered
RGB split offset within 5px tolerance of intended shift

recipes.name: 3D Retro Pixel Font
recipes.description: Three-dimensional retro pixel font with depth extrusion and grid-aligned rendering

allowed_inputs.description: Text to render in retro pixel style
Size of each pixel block in px
Array of CSS colors for pixel depth layers

review_hints.check: pixels aligned to integer grid for crisp retro look
text remains readable after depth extrusion
color palette layers distinguishable from each other

recipes.name: Strava Run Visualization
recipes.description: Running route visualization on map with elevation profile, pace zones, and start/end markers

allowed_inputs.description: Array of [lat, lng] waypoints along run route
Array of elevation values matching route_coords
Array of pace zone segments with color and label

review_hints.check: route trace clips accurately to map bounds without overflow
elevation profile curve matches route elevation data
pace zone colors distinguishable from each other

recipes.name: Kinetic Marketing Presentation
recipes.description: Branded kinetic marketing presentation with animated headline, body lines, and logo reveal

allowed_inputs.description: Array of body text lines for staggered animation
Primary brand color as CSS color
URL to brand logo for reveal animation

review_hints.check: headline prominent and fully visible on first frame
body line cadence matches natural reading pace
brand colors applied consistently across all text elements

recipes.name: Audio Spectrum Analyzer
recipes.description: Frequency spectrum bars or circular visualization synced to audio input

allowed_inputs.description: Path or URL to audio file
Mirror spectrum vertically for symmetric display

review_hints.check: bar heights proportional to frequency amplitude bins
no visual aliasing or bar overlap at peak levels
frequency color mapping consistent across full range

recipes.name: Canvas Magnifying Glass
recipes.description: HTML canvas magnifying glass lens effect with configurable zoom factor and lens radius

allowed_inputs.description: URL or data URI of source image
Lens center [x, y] position as fraction of canvas

review_hints.check: magnified region centered precisely on lens position
distortion at lens edge smooth without hard cutoff
lens border visible against both dark and light backgrounds

recipes.name: Canvas Glitch Effect
recipes.description: Digital glitch distortion with RGB channel split, horizontal displacement, and noise overlay

allowed_inputs.description: URL or data URI of source image or video frame
Glitch burst frequency in bursts per second

review_hints.check: glitch displacement does not obscure readable text areas
RGB channel split within configurable tolerance limit
glitch intensity visibly responds to user setting

recipes.name: Canvas Vintage Film Effect
recipes.description: Vintage film look with scanlines, sepia tone, vignette, and optional grain noise

allowed_inputs.description: URL or data URI of source image or video frame

review_hints.check: scanline spacing consistent across full frame height
sepia tone preserves sufficient contrast for readability
vignette darkening does not clip important content at edges

recipes.name: BMS Cell Balancing Animation
recipes.description: Battery management system cell balancing diagram with energy flow visualization

allowed_inputs.description: Number of battery cells in series (4-16)
Array of [from, to] cell indices for energy flow
Show active balancing animation between cells

review_hints.check: cell layout visually matches selected topology
energy flow arrows direction correct per circuit
cell labels and voltage text readable at output resolution

recipes.name: Solar System Orbit
recipes.description: 3D solar system orbit animation with planets, orbital paths, and adjustable camera angle

allowed_inputs.description: Array of planet names to include in animation
Planet and orbit scale relative to default

review_hints.check: planet sizes proportional to each other within scale factor
orbits rendered as ellipses not circles unless scale adjusted
planet labels track position accurately during orbit

recipes.name: Apple-Style Device Rise
recipes.description: 3D device hero animation with device rising into view, reflection, and screen content mapping

allowed_inputs.description: Device: phone, tablet, laptop, monitor, watch
URL or data URI for screen content image
Device chassis color as CSS color
Rise height as fraction of canvas height 0.1-1.0

review_hints.check: device reflection matches device orientation and position
screen content UV-mapped correctly without distortion
device edges anti-aliased against background
